prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-MBMPRK-STD-BLCK Product Type: FABRIC_APPLIQUE_PATCH Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches for Bug Netting and Screen Repair, 3” Patches Description: The Bug Mesh Patch Kit by will keep bugs out while you're camping or hiking.

This handy patch kit comes with 2 3" Tenacious Tape clear rings and 2 2½" no-see mesh patches to cover up any small hole or tear whether you're at home or out in the field. These patches are super easy to use - just position the mesh, peel and stick the Tenacious Tape ring.

Make sure to keep the Bug Mesh Patch Kit in your camping gear and bring it with you anywhere those pesky pests may be. Search Terms: camping outdoors gear repair patches Features: - Patch holes and tears smaller than 2-3" - Easy at home or in the field, just peel and stick - Includes two 3" precut Tenacious Tape clear rings - Includes two no-see-um mesh fabric patches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Mesh Patches Bug Netting Repair

openai.item_name: GEAR AID 3" Mesh Patches for Bug Netting and Screen Repair

tokens.name: Mesh Patches for Bug Netting and Screen Repair
